ahsd_benchmark.output_snippet: It looks like your input got cut off. Could you please provide more information or clarify your request so I can better assist you?
ahsd_benchmark.note: Run stopped at EOS after 26 tokens despite IGNORE_EOS=1 (AHSD native loop still breaks on Phi EOS ids).

skip_mask_verification.rationale: Draft path is ~55% of full forward latency (12/32 layers skipped). Per-cycle draft ~78ms vs verify ~110ms matches expected geometry; total draft_ms>1000ms is cumulative over 13 cycles, not per-step regression.

break_even.formula: alpha > draft_ms / (verify_ms - draft_ms) => alpha > 69/111 ≈ 0.62 for K=1

decision_tree.label: High per-layer similarity, low combined acceptance
evidence: 29/32 layers exceed 0.97 cosine on single-layer skip probes
Static mask 10-21 combined cosine 0.971 with greedy argmax mismatch (200020 vs 382)

secondary_experiments: Run ASDSL_AHSD_CALIBRATE=1 with logits .copy() fix to pick sparse non-contiguous skip set (avoid stacking 12 correlated skips)
Probe smaller skip bundles (e.g. layers 12-15 only) and re-measure combined logit cosine + acceptance
Exclude layers 20-21 from static mask (combined cosine borderline at 0.97)

phase_g_notes.goal: Raise C0 autoregressive IPC without speculative acceptance risk
phase_g_notes.verify_bottleneck: forward_verify_serial runs K serial full forward_token calls; batched forward_batch exists but is not used in AHSD verify path
phase_g_notes.gemm_batch_cpp: Phase G batched preq GEMM (gemm_batch.cpp) already supports batch_size>1 for gate_up/qkv; wire forward_batch all_logits into generate_ahsd verify to amortize projection GEMMs across K+1 positions
phase_g_notes.expected_win: If verify_ms drops from ~110ms to ~80ms at K=1, C0-style path gains ~25-30% before any speculative draft work

bugs_fixed_during_diagnostic: ahsd.py and profile_layer_similarity.py now .copy() UnifiedEngine logits buffer before cosine compare (shared logits_out_ buffer caused false 1.0 similarity)
